collab_tasks_created.description: 协同任务：时间窗内创建任务数（ADB 三分片相加）。
collab_tasks_created.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM dt_collaborative_task WHERE COALESCE(deleted_at,0)=0 AND created_at >= TIMESTAMP '{start} 00:00:00' AND created_at < TIMESTAMP '{end_excl} 00:00:00';

collab_active_orgs_created.description: 协同任务：时间窗内创建过任务的活跃工厂数（org_id 跨分片并集去重）。
collab_active_orgs_created.sql: SELECT DISTINCT org_id FROM dt_collaborative_task WHERE COALESCE(deleted_at,0)=0 AND created_at >= TIMESTAMP '{start} 00:00:00' AND created_at < TIMESTAMP '{end_excl} 00:00:00';
